form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 0.5 len behind Melody Fair carrying 58kg at $61. The start before that eased back early on 6th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 19 over 1230m, slow going 9 len behind Buderim carrying 58kg at $12. Consider on his latest effort.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign 4th of 12 at Bunbury Mdn on August 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Saturday Sesh carrying 58kg at $3.60. When resuming last campaign 2nd of 11 at Pinjarra 3yo Mdn on March 6 2025 over 1200m, 4 len behind Sixinch Heels with 57kg at $21. Won trial at Lark Hill over 950m on April 7. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 13 at Ascot Mdn on April 3 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Belaura Star with 55.5kg at $8. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at Northam Mdn on September 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; neck behind True Fiction carrying 50.5kg at $2.70. Looks tough to beat in this line-up.
